zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde Flaitel於1014年9月5日出生在法國諾門迪曼其隆維爾時，她的父親Gérard de Flaitel40歲，母親Agnès d'Evreux29歲。她於1033年7月3日與Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill在法國諾門迪曼其隆維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1080年在法國布格尼艾福內維斯享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布霍德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermengarde Flaitel于1014年9月5日出生在法国諾門迪曼其隆維爾时，她的父亲Gérard de Flaitel40岁，母亲Agnès d'Evreux29岁。她于1033年7月3日与Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill在法国諾門迪曼其隆維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1080年在法国布格尼艾福內維斯享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布霍德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde Flaitel was born on 5 September 1014, in Longueville, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Gérard de Flaitel, was 40 and her mother, Agnès d'Evreux, was 29. She married Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill on 3 July 1033, in Longueville, Manche, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1080, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde Flaitel est née le 5 septembre 1014, à Longueville, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Gérard de Flaitel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnès d'Evreux, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill le 3 juillet 1033, à Longueville, Manche, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1080, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Marys and St Chad Churchyard, Brewood: St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde Flaitel am 5. September 1014 in Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gérard de Flaitel 40 und ihre Mutter Agnès d'Evreux 29. Sie hat am 3. Juli 1033 in Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1080 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde Flaitel è nata il il 5 settembre 1014 nel Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Gérard de Flaitel, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnès d'Evreux, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill il 3 luglio 1033, nel Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1080, nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Flaitelが1014年9月5日にフランスノーマンディマンチェロングエヴィルで生まれた時，父Gérard de Flaitelは40歳，母Agnès d'Evreuxは29歳であった。1033年7月3日にフランスノーマンディマンチェロングエヴィルでWalter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1080年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブレウッドスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Marys and St Chad Churchyard, Brewood: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Flaitel(이)가 1014년 9월 5일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 론구에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gérard de Flaitel(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès d'Evreux(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1033년 7월 3일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 론구에빌에서 Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1080년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브레우드 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde Flaitel nasceu em 5 de setembro de 1014, em Longueville, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gérard de Flaitel, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnès d'Evreux, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill em 3 de julho de 1033, em Longueville, Manche, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1080, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde Flaitel родилась 5 сентября 1014 г. в местности лонгуевилл, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gérard de Flaitel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès d'Evreux, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill 3 июля 1033 г. в местности лонгуевилл, манч, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1080 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, брюуд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermengarde Flaitel nació el 5 de septiembre de 1014, en Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gérard de Flaitel, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnès d'Evreux, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill el 3 de julio de 1033, en Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1080, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary's Church, Brewood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
